_meta.name: ALM 14B r11 LoRA — r10 regression fix plan
_meta.status: BLOCKED — Python ban (2026-04-16) prohibits peft/transformers LoRA path. Plan kept for reference but ALM track frozen until hexa-native LoRA trainer + serve land.
_meta.block_reason: feedback_py_ban_total.md — no .py create/edit/run. Existing train_alm_*.py + serve_alm_14b.py are forbidden. ALM serve already terminated (ALM pod itfl66q4z768kh-serve no longer RUNNING). hexa-native ALM 14B requires net_listen builtin + libhxqwen14b.so FFI — both missing per hexa_serve_native_plan_20260416.md.

goal.primary: Beat r9 lenient baseline 0.8667 on hire_sim without regressing free-form domains
goal.non_goal: Push hire_sim ≥ 0.95 — diminishing returns, focus on robustness

training_parameters.base_lora: /runpod/ckpt_r9 (NOT r10 — start fresh from r9 best)
training_parameters.lr_rationale: 4× lower than r10 (2e-6). Stack-on-LoRA training amplifies effective lr; r10 EMA stayed at 7.84 (model diverging). 5e-7 should converge instead of diverge.
training_parameters.steps_rationale: 3× shorter than r10. r10's 1500 steps × 100-task corpus = ~15 epochs of memorization. 500 steps × mixed corpus = ~1.5 epochs, gentler.
training_parameters.lora_rationale: Half of r10's r=16/alpha=32. Smaller rank constrains drift. 8/16 is industry-default for fine-tuning instruct models.

korean_general_sources: Public KO datasets: KMMLU instructions, NSMC, Korean dialogue from huggingface
preprocessing: Token cap: total ~5000 samples × 800 tokens avg = 4M tokens

expected_metrics.loss_trace_check: step 100 loss should be ≤ 5.0 — if higher, abort and retune lr

abort_criteria: loss > 6.0 at step 200 → kill, lr too high
loss decreasing but eval_loss diverging → kill, overfitting
hire_sim < 0.7 at step 300 mid-eval → kill, regression starting
post_training_eval: smoke test: 20 free-form Korean prompts, qualitative check
blocked_by: Free H100 GPU (current usage: itfl66q4z768kh-serve + 0ws0tlmo9e04v7-clm-r4). Per H100-2-pod policy, must wait for clm-r4 to finish (~41h) OR get user approval for 3rd pod.
next_step_when_unblocked: 1. Spin up new H100 pod or reuse clm-r4 pod
2. SCP r9 base ckpt + corpus + train_alm_r11.py
5. If ≥ r9: deploy as new prod LoRA. If <: keep r9, plan r12.
